date_condition.note: TRADEDATE is stored as NUMBER(YYYYMMDD), use direct numeric comparison with >= and <=, do NOT wrap with DATE() function.

bank_lookup.description: Two-step institution lookup strategy: first query XF_BASE_BANK with LIKE '%name%' to find matching BANKID(s), then use the BANKID(s) to filter trades.

steps.action: SELECT BANKID FROM XF_BASE_BANK WHERE BANKNAME LIKE '%目标机构名%'
steps.note: Use LIKE with wildcards for fuzzy matching on bank name.

steps.action: Use the retrieved BANKID(s) in WHERE clause: BANKID IN (...) to filter trade records.
steps.note: If no matching BANKID is found, return empty result directly.

union_strategy.note: Use UNION ALL to merge results from multiple view types (spot, fwd, swap) into a single result set. Each sub-query selects from one view with the same column set and filters.
